removals.reason: pre-v1 Frame adds terminal ExitCode and a typed truncated-before boundary so Control preserves exit state and makes bounded live-output gaps visible
pre-v1 Snapshot adds a typed truncated-before boundary so late task-stream readers cannot mistake a bounded retained suffix for complete terminal output
pre-v1 approval request adds the SDK durable pause identity for Control-owned approval correlation
pre-v1 approval payload retains normalized ACP ToolCall kind, title, status, raw output, and content so child permissions round-trip without loss
pre-v1 Event adds typed child origin and approval request identity required for durable M2 replay without reconstructing semantic relations from display metadata
pre-v1 Control mutation purposes add explicit session lifecycle authority so semantic close can overlap a cancelling Runtime lease without using an anonymous bypass
pre-v1 StateWriter replaces legacy unfenced signatures with request-scoped revision CAS and explicit mutation authority so durable semantic state cannot bypass an active Session lease
pre-v1 low-level Store adopts the request-scoped State mutation contract and returns the exact committed Session for revision-aware recovery
pre-v1 context checkpoints use uint64 end to end so durable sequence values cannot truncate before the decimal-string HTTP projection
pre-v1 context checkpoint contracts use uint64 end to end so durable sequence values cannot truncate before the decimal-string HTTP projection
pre-v1 controller context requests use uint64 checkpoints so resume values preserve the full durable sequence domain
pre-v1 handoff context checkpoints use uint64 so Control can preserve the full durable sequence domain
pre-v1 turn context checkpoints use uint64 so Runtime receives the exact durable sequence selected by Control
pre-v1 durable controller bindings use uint64 checkpoints so Session state can represent the complete sequence domain
pre-v1 durable participant bindings use uint64 checkpoints so Session state can represent the complete sequence domain
